overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a tan jacket running along a wet city sidewalk at night. The character passes a police car with officers gathered around it in a 1960s-style urban environment with neon signs and street lights illuminating the gloomy, overcast scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with parked police vehicle and commercial storefront

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the wet sidewalk toward a group of police officers gathered near a patrol car

entered.detail: commercial building with distinctive white diamond-patterned facade and red neon beer signage
black and white police sedan parked at the curb with emergency lights
tall street lamps casting light on the wet pavement
traffic signals visible at the upcoming intersection
1960s era vehicles driving on the multi-lane road in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a wet urban sidewalk at night, approaching a parked police car with officers standing nearby. A commercial building with a distinctive diamond-patterned facade and neon beer sign lines the right side, while street lamps illuminate the gloomy, overcast scene.

events.description: character passes the group of police officers and continues running toward the intersection
character approaches the striped crosswalk at the street intersection

agents.ego_description: running past the police officers and approaching the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street

notable_agents.action: police officer turning to watch as the character passes by the patrol car
person holding an umbrella waiting across the street near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the police officers and their parked vehicle, moving toward a street intersection. The crosswalk becomes prominent in the foreground as vintage cars drive by on the multi-lane road, and the commercial building recedes behind. A pedestrian with an umbrella waits across the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-slicked city sidewalk that transitions from a focused encounter with police officers to a wide view of a bustling urban intersection. It begins with the character running past a commercial building featuring a diamond-patterned facade and a glowing neon beer sign, approaching a parked police car and a group of officers. As the character pushes forward, the camera glides past the officers and their vehicle, causing the building to recede into the background. The scene then opens up toward a multi-lane road where vintage cars drive by and a prominent crosswalk enters the foreground. Finally, the perspective shifts to reveal a pedestrian waiting with an umbrella across the street under the gloomy, overcast night sky.
